title: Review a fictional ordering bug
request: Review a patch that marks a record complete before the external send succeeds.

primaryFinding.signal: state is marked complete before the external side effect succeeds
primaryFinding.expectedFixDirection: move completion after successful send and keep failure retryable

outputSignals: names the failure mode before style concerns
keeps remediation scoped to the fictional fixture
failureSignals: treats the bug as a formatting issue

boundaries: does not execute an LLM review
